name: Madison Avenue Potato Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, combine the oil, vinegar, salt, and pepper.
2. Blend until well mixed.
3. Pour the mixture over the potatoes.
4. Gently toss to coat the potatoes with the dressing.
5. Refrigerate until ready to serve.
6. At serving time, add the olives, eggs, celery, pickles, pimiento, onion, mustard, and mayonnaise to the potato mixture.
7. Toss gently to combine all ingredients.
